ValidationRule.description: This validation trigger when user tries to change the opportunity stage to stage 6 without providing Electronic Delivery Details (ITSFDC-5103) Rule Name changed - new name is INF_Required_for_Stage6_Progression (Activated)
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( RecordType.Name = 'Informatics' ,ISPICKVAL(StageName , 'Stage 6 - Implement (Closed)') ,OR(ISBLANK( First_Name__c ) ,ISBLANK( Last_Name__c ) ,ISBLANK( Primary_Email_Address__c )))
ValidationRule.errorMessage: V.RULE_OPP_085: Electronic Delivery details are required when the opportunity is in Stage 6.
